creator: gd@rambler-co.ru
text:
On Fri, 05 Apr 2013 22:19:45 +0900
Hirohisa Yamaguchi <umq@ueo.co.jp> wrote:

> Hi,
> 
> As mentioned in freebsd-ports@ [1], net/nbd-server has a test suite.
> But they don't run in my environment.
> 
> In my patch, I've done:
>  - fix test-client, which had a strange use of getopt(3) and
>    apparently assumed that it will run on IPv4 only environment
>  - modify test script to create temporary directory as intended
>  - add missing header files and fix typo to reduce compiler warnings
>  - and made some aesthetic change
> 
> 
> [1] http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?515D33E6.90208
> 
> Regards,
> -- 
> 
> 	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
> 	  umq@ueo.co.jp

Well, your patch looks much better then my.
Thanks for this.

-- 
Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru>
